name: story_glitch_in_the_airlock_raw
utterances: Jax was a freelance space-salvager.
Jax had neon-blue hair.
Jax borrowed oxygen without asking.
Jax was scouting the Nebula Sector.
Jax's thrusters flickered out.
Jax docked at a chrome-plated dome on an asteroid.
Jax asked whether the station was occupied.
The station was silent.
There were three canisters of liquid star-fuel in the galley charging station.
Jax sipped the mega-cell.
The mega-cell was too radioactive for Jax.
Jax's teeth glowed green.
Jax sipped the eco-cell.
The eco-cell was too sluggish for Jax.
Jax felt like she swallowed molasses.
Jax sipped the nano-cell.
The nano-cell was just right for Jax.
Jax's jetpack hummed with crystalline energy.
There were three pairs of anti-gravity boots in the mudroom.
Jax stepped into the titan boots.
The titan boots were too heavy for Jax.
Jax could not lift her feet off the floor.
Jax tried the hover-slippers.
The hover-slippers were too floaty for Jax.
Jax bounced off the ceiling.
Jax hit her head.
Jax wore the sonic-zips.
The sonic-zips were just right for Jax.
Jax zoomed around the room in the sonic-zips.
Jax pushed the sonic-zips too hard.
The sonic-zips blew a fuse.
The sonic-zips became a charred mess.
Jax found the sleeping quarters.
Jax tried the cryo-chamber.
The cryo-chamber was too cold for Jax.
Jax tried the memory-foam cloud.
The memory-foam cloud was too squishy for Jax.
Jax climbed into the bio-hammock.
The bio-hammock was just right for Jax.
Jax fell asleep in the bio-hammock.
Unit-Alpha returned from a morning spacewalk.
Unit-Beta returned from a morning spacewalk.
Widget returned from a morning spacewalk.
Unit-Alpha said someone siphoned his high-grade isotopes.
Unit-Beta said someone tasted her organic fuel.
Widget said someone drank his nano-cell and emptied the vial.
Unit-Alpha said someone tried to calibrate his titan boots.
Unit-Beta said someone left scuff marks on her hover-slippers.
Widget said someone wore his sonic-zips and fried the motherboards.
Unit-Alpha said a biological entity had been in his cryo-chamber.
Unit-Beta said her memory-foam cloud was compressed.
Widget saw Jax asleep in his bio-hammock.
Jax woke up and saw Unit-Alpha, Unit-Beta, and Widget.
Jax activated her jetpack.
Jax performed a zero-gravity backflip through the airlock.
Jax vanished into the starfield.
Widget hoped Jax would leave a review on the Galactic Map.
Widget said Jax really liked his fuel.
